SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-10-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-10-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT YERGALEM BERAKI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT ISSA KRAKAR IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT KRAKAR, ISSA G. RECOVER FROM APPELLANT BERAKI, YERGALEM $3,950.40 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,025.40, THE PRINCIPAL ISSUE IN DISPUTE IS WHETHER DR.KRAKAR PERFORMED ANY DENTAL SERVICES OF MS. BERAKI IN 2018 & 2019. THE PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE SHOWS THAT HE DID. NONE OF THE DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED BY MS. BERAKI RECEIVED DENTAL SERVICES FROM DR.ALI ON 2/28/19 DOES NOT PRECLUDE DR.KRAKAR HAVING PROVIDED HER DENTAL SERVICES ON THE SAME DAY. THE ENTRIES IN THE BILLING RECORDS FOR THE TWO DENTISTS ON 2/28/19 DO NOT SHOW DUPLICATIVE WORK. WHILE DR.KRAKAR SEEKS JUDGMENT OF $5766.40, HIS BILLING RECORDS SHOW THAT $1816 OF THAT AMOUNT WAS UNPAID SINCE 2006 & THUS IS BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-26-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Yergalem Beraki, Appellant/Plaintiff (415) 426-8333
Issa G. Krakar, Respondent/Defendant (415) 781-2290
Haile Beyene, Certified Court Tigrinya interpreter for the plaintiff.

This case comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.
The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit 1 - Plaintiff's Statement of Account Dated 6/13/19
Exhibit 2 - Plaintiff's Single Patient Ledger Dated 3/6/19

Both parties provode testimony

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.
All exhibits are retained by the Court at this time.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: R. Gumpal, Not Reported, (505)

Judgment is signed and entered after hearing.
